blurb: The Apple Security Research Device (SRD) is a specialized iPhone hardware platform made available to approved security researchers under a formal program. The SRD enables deeper security investigation into iOS than is possible on production devices, providing SSH access, a root shell, and customizable security policies for targeted research. Despite these research-oriented capabilities, the SRD still runs a signed OS and maintains many production device protections. Researchers accepted into the program must agree to responsible disclosure terms and use the device exclusively for security research activities consistent with the program agreement.
